title: anacamptis pyramidalis var. serotina
intro: Anacamptis pyramidalis var. serotina, also known as the autumnal orchid, is a subspecies of orchid plant that is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anacamptis pyramidalis var. serotina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
